title: Remote ML Engineer - 60735
company_description:
Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.

Powering this growth is Turing’s talent cloud—an AI-vetted pool of 4M+ software engineers, data scientists, and STEM experts who can train models and build AI applications. All of this is orchestrated by ALAN—our AI-powered platform for matching and managing talent, and generating high-quality human and synthetic data to improve model performance. ALAN also accelerates workflows for model and agent evals, supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, reinforcement learning with human feedback, preference-pair generation, benchmarking, data capture for pre-training, post-training, and building AI applications.

Turing—based in San Francisco, California—was named #1 on The Information’s annual list of “Top 50 Most Promising B2B Companies,” and has been profiled by Fast Company, TechCrunch, Reuters, Semafor, VentureBeat, Entrepreneur, CNBC, Forbes, and many others. Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, X, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT.

description_html:
About Turing:

Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P&L


Role Overview:

We are looking for experienced Machine Learning Engineers (MLE Bench) to contribute to benchmark-driven evaluation projects focused on real-world machine learning systems. This role involves hands-on work with production-grade ML codebases, model training and evaluation pipelines, and deployment-oriented workflows to help assess and improve the capabilities of advanced AI systems.

The ideal candidate is comfortable bridging research and engineering, working deeply with models, data, and infrastructure in realistic ML environments.


What does day-to-day life look like?

  • Work with real-world ML codebases to support MLE Bench–style evaluation tasks.
  • Build, run, and modify model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines.
  • Prepare datasets, features, and metrics for ML benchmarking and validation.
  • Debug, refactor, and improve production-like ML systems for correctness and performance.
  • Evaluate model behavior, failure modes, and edge cases relevant to benchmark tasks.
  • Write clean, reproducible, and well-documented Python code for ML workflows.
  • Participate in code reviews to ensure high standards of engineering quality.
  • Collaborate with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real-world ML engineering tasks for AI system evaluation.


Requirements:

  • Minimum 3+ years of overall experience as a Machine Learning Engineer or Software Engineer (ML-focused).
  • Strong proficiency in Python for machine learning and data workflows.
  • Hands-on experience with model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines.
  • Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals (supervised/unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, optimization).
  • Experience working with ML frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, or similar).
  • Ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex, real-world ML codebases.
  • Experience writing readable, reusable, and maintainable production-quality code.
  • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.
  • Excellent spoken and written English communication skills.


Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.


Offer Details:

  • Commitments Required: At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST.
  • Engagement Type: Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave)
  • Duration of Contract: 3 months (adjustable based on engagement)


After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.
score_reason: Strong skills in Python, ML frameworks, and NLP align well with the ML Engineer role, and candidate's experience in fine-tuning language models matches the frontier AI focus.

description_html:
Indetechs Software Limited. is looking for AI Engineer (Hybrid)


Job Description / Responsibility

About Us

We craft innovative solutions across diverse industrial sectors. Fueled by passion, precision, and purpose, Indetechs Software Ltd. sits at the crossroads of technical expertise and business acumen.We are a global team of engineers, innovators, and strategists collaborating closely with international partners to enhance operations and develop sustainable, future-ready solutions. We specialize in delivering forefront engineering solutions (LCA, Decision Support Systems), digital transformation (Digital Twins, Product Passports), and strategic communications for global initiatives.

The Role:

We are seeking a skilled AI engineer to join our team in Dhaka. You will bridge the gap between R&D and software engineering, collaborating with international professionals to build and deploy AI solutions for complex scientific problems. Additionally, you will be responsible for preparing technical reports and delivering presentations to share research findings with our global partners.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Model Development: Design, train, and validate ML models (Regression, Classification, Time-Series)
  • Data Pipelines: Build pipelines to clean and manage datasets from diverse sources (sensors, medical records, etc.).
  • Deployment: Wrap ML models into APIs (FastAPI/Flask) for integration into various applications.
  • Collaboration: Work with domain experts across EU and UK researchers to translate scientific concepts into production-ready code.



Educational Requirements

  • Bachelor of Science (BSc)
  • Master of Science (MSc)
  • Skills Required: Artificial intelligence (AI)

Experience Requirements

  • At least 3 year(s)
  • The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s):
  • Artificial Intelligence (AI) Startup


Additional Requirements

Requirements:

  • Tech Stack: Expert Python skills with strong command of NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-Learn, and PyTorch/TensorFlow.
  • Engineering: Proficiency in Git and RESTful APIs.
  • Communication: Excellent English skills are required for coordination with our UK and European partners.
  • Experience is negotiable for highly skilled individuals.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Good at mathematics
  • Experience with MLOps (Docker) or Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP).
  • Familiarity with Computer Vision (OpenCV) or NLP.


Job Location

Anywhere in Bangladesh
score_reason: Candidate has relevant AI skills and experience but may lack specific domain knowledge in industrial solutions and strategic engineering for this hybrid AI engineer role.

description_html:
Company Name: RacoAI

Location: Dhaka

Job Type: Full-Time

Workplace Type: On-Site

Job ID: IJOB202614011

Join RacoAI as a Frontend Engineer

URGENT HIRING

Job Type: On-site, Weekly 5 days

Location: Uttara, Dhaka

Position: 1

About RacoAI

At RacoAI, we build AI-driven products that help businesses understand and utilize their data more intelligently. We are intentional about how we build prioritizing clarity, long-term thinking, and engineering discipline over shortcuts. We operate with a high level of trust, accountability, and respect. Our teams work in a cross-functional environment where engineering, AI, product, and operations collaborate closely. We believe great products are built by people who care deeply about quality, ethics, and ownership.

Role Overview

We are looking for a Frontend Engineer with strong expertise in Figma and modern frontend development. This role is fully focused on frontend engineering and UI/UX design, there are no backend or AI development responsibilities. You will work closely with the Team Lead and COO, as well as a cross-functional AI team, to clearly understand product goals from a high-level perspective, define user flows, and implement frontend solutions that meet both product and engineering standards. This role is suited for someone who takes pride in their work, values clear communication, and holds themselves to a high bar. We are looking for someone who wants to be excellent not by title, but by execution.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop a clear understanding of product requirements, system behavior, and user journeys from a high-level business and technical viewpoint.
  • Actively seek clarity and alignment from the Team Lead,and COO before execution, ensuring no ambiguity in scope or intent.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional AI, product, and engineering teams with professionalism and mutual respect.
  • Design user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity interfaces using Figma, maintaining usability, consistency, and simplicity.
  • Translate approved Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive, and maintainable frontend implementations.
  • Develop and maintain frontend applications using React.js / Next.js.
  • Integrate frontend applications with backend and AI-powered APIs, handling data flow, loading states, and edge cases responsibly.
  • Build scalable, reusable UI components that can grow with the product.
  • Ensure frontend quality through attention to performance, accessibility, and user experience.
  • Communicate in a professional, ethical, and respectful manner at all times.
  • Participate in design reviews, sprint planning, and frontend architecture discussions with a solutions-oriented mindset.

Mandatory Skills

  • Strong expertise in Figma (Auto Layout,components, variants, and design systems).
  • Strong experience with React.js and Next.js.
  • Excellent command of HTML5, CSS3, and modern styling approaches (Tailwind CSS/Bootstrap CSS/ CSS Modules).
  • Solid understanding of JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Strong understanding of UI/UX principles, user flows, and interaction design.
  • Hands-on experience with API integration (REST APIs, async data handling and more).
  • Ability to translate high-level direction into clear ui design.
  • Comfortable working in a team that values accountability and quality over speed alone.
  • Familiarity with Git and collaborative development workflows.

Bonus Skills (Nice To Have)

  • Experience working with enterprise applications like data-heavy or AI-powered interfaces.
  • Experience contributing to or maintaining design systems.
  • Familiarity with frontend testing tools.

Education

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • A strong frontend and Figma portfolio is highly valued.

Salary Range : 20000-25000 BDT (Based on experience and skill level)

We value competence and ownership over years of experience.

Why RacoAI

  • You will work with people who take their responsibilities seriously.
  • Clear direction and decision-making from leadership (Team Lead,COO).
  • A culture where quality is expected, not negotiated.
  • Honest communication, realistic timelines, and mutual respect.
  • Opportunity to build products you can be proud of.
  • A workplace that rewards discipline, clarity, and continuous improvement.

Employee Facilities

  • Yearly Performance Bonus Annual bonus of up to 100% of monthly salary.
  • 5% bonus on project completion acquired by you
  • Yearly two increment
  • Office Snacks & Refreshments

Complimentary snacks and refreshments to support a comfortable and productive work environment.

  • Supportive & Respectful Workplace

A professional environment built on mutual respect,clear communication, ethical practices, and long-term employee well-being.

Requirements

  • Experience: N/A
  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering, Related field
  • Skills: Figma, React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap CSS, CSS Modules, JavaScript (ES6+), UI/UX principles, API integration, Git

Last Date of Application: 09 March 2026

description_html:
PRAN Group is looking for Management Trainee Officer - MIS (AI Developer)


Job Description / Responsibility

  • Assist in the collection, validation, and organization of large datasets from various internal sources (sales, finance, operations)
  • Generate regular and ad-hoc reports using SQL, Excel, or BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) to support management decisions
  • Monitor the performance of existing MIS systems, troubleshoot data discrepancies, and ensure data integrity and security
  • Study current business workflows to identify bottlenecks and areas where automation or data analysis can add value
  • Support senior developers in building, training, and testing machine learning models for predictive analytics (e.g., sales forecasting, customer churn prediction)
  • Assist in integrating AI capabilities (like chatbots, recommendation engines, or intelligent dashboards) into existing MIS platforms
  • Develop scripts and automation tools (using Python or similar) to streamline manual reporting tasks and data cleansing processes
  • Stay updated on the latest trends in AI, large language models (LLMs), and data analytics, proposing innovative applications for the business


Educational Requirements

  • Bachelor of Science (BSc)
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • Skills Required: Programming, Database management, MIS Reporting, Artificial intelligence (AI)


Experience Requirements

  • At most 2 year(s)
  • The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Software Company,IT Enabled Service
  • Freshers are also encouraged to apply.


Additional Requirements

  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to interpret complex data
  • A genuine passion for AI and technology, with the initiative to self-learn
  • Ability to translate technical findings into simple business insights for non-technical stakeholders
  • High level of accuracy in data handling and reporting


Job Location

Rajshahi
score_reason: Experience with data handling, SQL, and ML model support aligns with the AI Developer role, though the focus on MIS and business workflows is somewhat peripheral.

We operate with a high level of trust, accountability, and respect. Our teams work in a cross-functional environment where engineering, AI, product, and operations collaborate closely. We believe great products are built by people who care deeply about quality, ethics, and ownership.

Role Overview

As an AI Engineer at Raco AI, you will build, and optimize state-of-the-art AI systems, focusing on Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vision-Language Models (VLM), Speech-to-Text (STT), Text-to-Speech (TTS), and Multimodal Analysis. You will create, fine-tune, adapt, and train models for production-level applications, while collaborating with product and backend teams to deploy AI-driven solutions. Your work will directly impact how RacoAI delivers cutting-edge AI capabilities to our customers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, fine-tune, and train LLMs, VLM, STT, TTS, and multimodal AI models.
  • Implement reinforcement learning pipelines and RLHF (Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback) for model optimization.
  • Develop scalable AI APIs and services using FastAPI.
  • Design and maintain database schemas and model metadata in PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
  • Evaluate model performance, implement improvements, and ensure reliability and robustness.
  • Collaborate with backend and product teams to integrate AI models into production systems.
  • Research and prototype new AI architectures, frameworks, and training techniques.
  • Optimize training pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.
  • Maintain clear documentation of AI models, experiments, and training workflows.

Mandatory Skills

  • Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
  • Good foundation in Data Structures & Algorithms.
  • Proven expertise in LLM, RAG, VLM, STT, TTS, and multimodal AI architectures.
  • Strong experience in fine-tuning, training, and modifying AI models for production use.
  • Deep understanding of reinforcement learning (RL) and RLHF, with hands-on implementation experience.
  • Proficiency in Python and FastAPI for building high-performance AI services.
  • Solid experience with PostgreSQL and MongoDB for managing model data, embeddings, and metadata.
  • Competence in distributed training, GPU pipelines, and deploying large-scale AI models.
  • Strong mathematical and algorithmic foundation in machine learning, optimization, and neural networks.

Education

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI or related fields.
  • Research experience in large-scale AI, multimodal models, or reinforcement learning is a plus.

Salary Range : 20000-25000 BDT (Based on experience and skill level)

Why RacoAI

  • You will work with people who take their responsibilities seriously.
  • Clear direction and decision-making from leadership (Team Lead,COO).
  • A culture where quality is expected, not negotiated.
  • Honest communication, realistic timelines, and mutual respect.
  • Opportunity to build products you can be proud of.
  • A workplace that rewards discipline, clarity, and continuous improvement.

Employee Facilities

  • Annual bonus of up to 100% of monthly salary.
  • 5% bonus on project completion acquired by you
  • Yearly two increment
  • Office Snacks & Refreshments

Complimentary snacks and refreshments to support a comfortable and productive work environment.

  • Supportive & Respectful Workplace

A professional environment built on mutual respect, clear communication, ethical practices, and long-term employee well-being.

Requirements

  • Experience: N/A
  • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI or related fields
  • Skills: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Data Structures & Algorithms, LLM, RAG, VLM, STT, TTS, Multimodal AI architectures, Reinforcement learning (RL), RLHF, Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Distributed training, GPU pipelines, Machine learning, Optimization, Neural networks

Last Date of Application: 09 March 2026
score_reason: Similar to Job 3, candidate's ML and AI skills are highly relevant for building AI-driven products, with strong experience in model fine-tuning and deployment.

description_html:
Role Title: Senior Solution Architect (L3)

Team: Central Support Team (All IM Products)

Location: Dhaka

Company: Intelligent Machines (IM)

Reports To: Executive Director



Role Overview

IM is seeking a Senior Solution Architect (L3) to define and govern the technical architecture across multiple product lines including Dexter, Biponon, Infinity (Retail & Business), Bitoron, ACS, and AI platforms.

This is a strategic + technical leadership role, responsible for architecture standards, cross-team alignment, and long-term scalability decisions.



Key Responsibilities

  • Own IM’s overall solution architecture framework across products
  • Define architectural principles, patterns, and best practices
  • Lead complex system design for large, multi-team initiatives
  • Review and approve solution designs proposed by L2 architects and tech leads
  • Ensure consistency across backend, frontend, app, AI, and data platforms
  • Work closely with Product Leadership to align architecture with roadmap
  • Guide cloud strategy, security posture, and performance standards
  • Mentor solution architects and senior engineers
  • Support critical escalations, performance bottlenecks, and system risks
  • Influence build-vs-buy decisions and third-party integrations



Must-Have Skills

  • 7+ years of experience in software engineering & architecture
  • Proven experience designing large-scale, multi-system architectures
  • Strong experience with backend systems (Node.js + Python)
  • Strong backend and system design background
  • Deep understanding of APIs, data modeling, scalability, and security
  • Experience leading architecture across multiple teams or products
  • Ability to communicate complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders



Should-Have Skills

  • Strong cloud architecture experience (AWS / GCP / Azure)
  • Experience with AI/ML systems, data platforms, or analytics pipelines
  • Exposure to enterprise-grade systems (retail, BFSI, logistics, telco, etc.)
  • Experience defining technical standards and governance models



Nice-to-Have

  • Experience in SaaS or platform-based companies
  • Exposure to cost optimization and performance tuning at scale
  • Prior experience in technical leadership or principal engineer roles



Seniority & Expectations

  • Owns architecture vision and standards across IM
  • Acts as final authority on major technical decisions
  • Mentors architects, tech leads, and senior engineers



Why Join IM

  • Shape the architecture of one of Bangladesh’s leading AI companies
  • High visibility role working directly with founders and leadership
  • Influence long-term technical direction across multiple AI products

description_html:
Company Name: RACO

Location: Dhaka

Job Type: Full-Time

Workplace Type: On-Site

Job ID: IJOB202500111

We're looking for a Backend Developer who is eager to learn, hungry to build, and ready to contribute to the next generation of AI products at RacoAI.

Role Overview

As a Backend Engineer at RacoAI, you will work on designing APIs, database schemas, distributed systems, and cloud-native services. You will collaborate with our product and AI teams to build smart, scalable backend systems powering our AI-driven products.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design schema and relationships — Plan database tables, structures, and entity relationships.
  • Write queries and migrations — Create, update, and maintain schemas with proper versioning.
  • Optimize DB performance — Implement indexing, caching strategies, and optimized joins.
  • Async/parallel processing — Build background workers and concurrent operations.
  • Queue systems — Implement Kafka/ Redis queues for asynchronous task processing.
  • Payments & integrations — Integrate Stripe, PayPal, and mobile banking platforms.
  • Email service integration — Use Send Grid, SMTP, or similar email providers.
  • API documentation — Maintain clear API specifications using Swagger/ OpenAPI.
  • Real-time communication — Implement Web Sockets, WebRTC, Socket.IO, and Webhooks.
  • CI/CD pipelines — Automate testing, building, and deployments.
  • Containerization — Package backend services using Docker/Kubernetes.
  • Server configuration — Optimize server setups with NGINX, pm2, Unicorn, or Unicorn.
  • Cloud deployment — Deploy backend services on AWS, GCP, Azure, or Digital Ocean

Requirements

  • Experience: N/A
  • Education: Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Computer Science Bachelorʼs degree in Computer Science, or a related field. Fresh graduates or final-year students are strongly encouraged to apply., Fresh graduates or final-year students are strongly encouraged to apply
  • Skills: Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)., Good foundation in Data Structures & Algorithms., Node.js + Express.js — REST API development using JavaScript/TypeScript, Django REST Framework — Backend development with Python and ORM capabilities., Golang — Building high-performance microservices and scalable backend systems., Experience with async/parallel processing using WebSocket, WebRTC, Socket.IO, , Experience with payment integrations — Stripe, PayPal, mobile banking (bKash, Rocket, Nagad, etc.)

Last Date of Application: 09 March 2026

description_html:
Full-Stack AI Engineer

Company: TygrLabs

Location: Gulshan, Dhaka, Bangladesh

Working Hours: 12 PM – 9 PM (5 days per week)

Job Type: Full-time

Position Overview

We are looking for a highly skilled Full Stack AI Engineer with expertise in Next.js, real time audio processing, and AI workflow orchestration to join our growing Innovations team.

Key Responsibilities

AI & Real Time Audio Systems

  • Build and maintain real-time audio processing pipelines, including microphone capture, streaming, and on the fly speech transcription.
  • Implement robust WebSocket-based real time speech-to-text systems and bi-directional data flows.
  • Integrate and optimize AI-driven workflows using frameworks such as Google Genkit, LangChain, or similar LLM orchestration tools.
  • Design structured JSON outputs, prompt templates, and evaluation systems for LLM interactions.


Frontend Engineering (Next.js & React)

  • Build scalable, performant applications using Next.js (App Router), React, and TypeScript.
  • Develop responsive UI components using Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, or shadcn/ui.
  • Create real-time dashboards, visual analytics, and interactive data visualizations using Recharts.
  • Implement animations and microinteractions using Framer Motion for smooth UX.


Real Time & Backend Systems

  • Architect and maintain WebSocket infrastructure for real-time events, audio streams, and transcript updates.
  • Integrate serverless backend services using Firebase & Firestore.
  • Ensure low-latency data synchronization, high availability, and performance optimization across the stack.


Performance & Quality

  • Apply modern optimization strategies to ensure smooth, real-time user experiences.
  • Use React Hook Form, Zod, and schema-driven validation to ensure data integrity.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with product, AI, and UX teams to deliver world-class digital experiences aligned with TygrLabs innovative product standards.


________________________________________

Core Tech Stack

  • Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript
  • Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, shadcn/ui
  • Firebase, Firestore
  • Recharts, Framer Motion
  • WebSockets, Web Audio API, Media Streams
  • React Hook Form, Zod


Qualifications

Frontend & Full Stack Expertise

  • 3+ years of experience with React and Next.js
  • Strong TypeScript and component-driven architecture knowledge
  • Experience with responsive UI systems and design libraries
  • Bachelors degree in CSE (preferred)


AI & Audio Engineering

  • Hands-on experience with Web Audio API, microphone input, buffer management, and audio streaming
  • Familiarity with speech-to-text systems (e.g., Deepgram, Whisper, AssemblyAI, Google STT)


Real-Time Systems

  • Proven expertise implementing WebSockets and real-time data pipelines


Backend & Cloud

  • Experience with Firebase Authentication, Firestore data modeling, and serverless functions


________________________________________

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Google Genkit, LangChain, or other AI orchestration frameworks
  • Background in AI-powered SaaS product development
  • Exposure to travel-tech or mobility platforms
  • Knowledge of analytics dashboards, agent workflows, or LLM tool-usage patterns


Benefits & Perks

At TygrLabs, we believe in taking care of our team. Our benefits include:

  • Annual Merit Increase Based on Performance
  • Festival Bonus
  • Monthly Meal Allowance
  • Health Insurance for employee and dependents
  • Health & Wellness Program
  • Paid Time Off
  • Annual Team Outing
  • Learning & Development Opportunities


Company Website

www.tygrlabs.co
